channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: Efficiency decreases job security and increases workload
item.description:
Notes:

As we become more efficient, we make our tasks more programmatic. When tasks can become programmatic, they can easily be automated, and a robot can replace you. Also, as we become more efficient, it appears that we have more free time. Rather than getting to focus on our goals, more tasks and responsibilities get added to our plate.

Sources:

  • Newport, C. (2016). Deep work: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.
  • Allen, D. (2015). Getting things done: The art of stress-free productivity.
